description_long: This is a cylindrical plastic bottle of Kiehl's Blue Astringent Herbal Lotion, featuring a white body with a blue and black printed label. The label covers most of the bottle's surface and contains detailed product information, including the brand name, product name, and usage instructions. The bottle is topped with a simple, smooth, white screw-on cap that is slightly rounded at the top. The label design is minimalist, with no decorative graphics except for the brand logo and text. The bottle appears to be semi-opaque, allowing some light to pass through but not revealing the contents inside. The overall appearance is clean and utilitarian, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A white cylindrical bottle of Kiehl's Blue Astringent Herbal Lotion with a printed label and a smooth screw-on cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Kiehl's logo, product name, and main label text clearly.
description_view_1: Side view revealing additional label text, including instructions and ingredients.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back label with more detailed product information and symbols.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the barcode and a partial view of the front and back labels.
